description: No calls were given. The oriole came to jelly feeders and hummingbird feeders and took a bath in the water feature. The oriole was quite yellow on the breast as compared to the common Bullock's Orioles in our yard. The long decurved dark bill looked quite different than the bill of Bullock's Orioles feeding at the same jelly feeders. The Bullock's Oriole bill is straight and not as dark. The Hooded Oriole is a little smaller when we were able to directly compare the size of the two oriole species.
